section.heading: Statement of purpose
section.chapeau: It is the purpose of this part to supplement State and local resources to—

paragraph.content: improve the quality of instruction in the fields of mathematics, science, and engineering in the State;
furnish additional resources and support for research, student scholarships, and faculty exchange programs in the fields of mathematics, science, and engineering; and
encourage partnerships in education between the business community, institutions of higher education, and elementary and secondary schools in the community.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1988—Pub. L. 100–418 substituted “part” for “subchapter” in introductory text.

note.heading: Short Title
note.p: Pub. L. 98–377, title III, § 301, Aug. 11, 1984, 98 Stat. 1283, as amended by Pub. L. 100–418, title VI, § 6031(b)(2), Aug. 23, 1988, 102 Stat. 1483, provided that: “This part [part A (§§ 301–309) of title III of Pub. L. 98–377 enacting this part] may be cited as the ‘Partnerships in Education for Mathematics, Science, and Engineering Act’.”
